title: delphinium fissum subsp. dinaricum
intro: Delphinium fissum subsp. dinaricum, also known as Dinaric delphinium, is a subspecies of the Delphinium fissum plant, a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Delphinium fissum subsp. dinaricum are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy, especially if taking prescription medications.
